name: Baleful Strix
oracle_text:
Flying, deathtouch
When Baleful Strix enters the battlefield, draw a card.
design_notes: Demonstrates several design principles at once: (1) artifact creatures have both types, (2) keywords like flying and deathtouch go on a single line separated by commas, (3) ETB (enters the battlefield) triggers use 'When ~ enters the battlefield' template, (4) blue provides flying and card draw, black provides deathtouch. A 1/1 with flying+deathtouch+cantrip for 2 mana shows multicolor value.
